releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed issue #81 
  - Made it so that a new view is only opened on startup if there is no view of that type already existing.
- Addressed issue #80 
  - Made the month and year title at the top of the calendar view change its format depending on the width of the view.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/compare/1.2.24...1.2.25

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added an option to decide whether to split the keys/values of tracker data at the first colon or the last colon, when importing a journal from Diarium, to address issue #79 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/compare/1.2.23...1.2.24

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added a [date format converter](https://github.com/Erallie/diarian?tab=readme-ov-file#date-format-converter) to address issue #70 
* Added necessary `await` to `import-journal.ts`
* Pull-Request [For_Development-9-17-2024] from Obsidian by @Erallie in https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/pull/68
* Pull-Request [For_Development-9-17-2024] from Obsidian by @Erallie in https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/pull/69


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/compare/1.2.6...1.2.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where setting the max rating lower than the current rating value in the rating modal broke the modal.
- Attempted to change the event listeners for the rating modal so that tapping and dragging on mobile works as intended.
- Added `await` before calling `onFileOpen()` in hopes that it might fix the issue of the rating bar not being updated when navigating to an already-existing daily note.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added the ability to use images for rating icons
  * There are still errors I need to fix, but most of it is working.
* Implemented requested changes for the [pull request](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/4092) onto [obsidian-releases](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases)
* move main.ts to src by @mProjectsCode in https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/pull/66

## New Contributors
* @mProjectsCode made their first contribution in https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/pull/66

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/diarian/compare/1.1.40...1.2.0
